faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency pest control call in University Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout University Heights and the Bronx, typically arriving within 2-4 hours of your call depending on your location and our current schedule. faqs.question: What types of pest emergencies warrant immediate service in University Heights?
faqs.answer: Emergency situations include severe bed bug infestations, large rodent populations, wasp or bee nests in living areas, cockroach outbreaks, evidence of structural damage from carpenter ants or termites, and any pest situation posing immediate health risks. We also handle urgent pre-move-in or pre-sale inspections for University Heights properties.
